name: Double-Slit Interference Pattern
description: Calculate positions of bright and dark fringes in double-slit interference patterns
identification_signal: Two slits, interference pattern, bright/dark fringes on screen

strategy.step_1: Identify d (slit separation), λ (wavelength), L (screen distance)
strategy.step_2: Use constructive condition for bright fringes: dsin(θ) = mλ
strategy.step_3: For small angles: y_m = mλL/d gives fringe position
strategy.step_4: Fringe spacing Δy = λL/d (distance between adjacent bright fringes)

front.text: Two slits separated by distance d, laser light creates pattern on distant screen

back.title: Double-Slit Interference
back.explanation: Use dsin(θ) = mλ for bright fringes. Central maximum at m=0.

steps.title: Path Difference Analysis
steps.instruction: Constructive when path difference δ = mλ. Destructive when δ = (m+½)λ.
how_to: For small θ: sin(θ) ≈ tan(θ) = y/L

steps.title: Fringe Spacing
steps.instruction: Distance between adjacent bright fringes: Δy = λL/d
steps.why: Fringes are equally spaced for small angles

solution.verification: Convert all to meters, result in meters ✓
